items.title: You can now remix other people’s YouTube Shorts with AI
items.description: Google announced a new YouTube Shorts Remix feature that lets users restyle clips or even insert themselves into other people's videos using Gemini Omni. items.title: Xbox hires game industry analyst Matthew Ball to lead strategy
items.description: Microsoft has recruited game industry analyst Matthew Ball as Xbox chief strategy officer.
